name: Lavender Vida Loca
description: Soap: flourishes of lavender and sweet chamomile help sooth your skin and clear your mind so you can sink into a peaceful slumber.
archive_note: Lavender Vida Loca is a Kitchen-exclusive soap that fits into the January 2026 sleep-themed box, featuring lavender and chamomile as key botanicals
nostalgia_angle: A playful nod to Lush's Vida Loca naming tradition, beloved by fans who enjoy Lush's whimsical product names paired with genuinely calming formulas
throwback_reference: Shares its calming lavender and chamomile spirit with the broader Lush sleep range, acting as a cleansing companion to products like Sleepy and Forty Winks
